name: jcamera-for-linux
description: A modern PyQt5 camera app for Linux - photo, video, screen recording

commands.test: python3 -c "from jcamera import *; print('All imports OK')"

rules: After any code change that adds, removes, or modifies a feature, setting, or dependency, update README.md to reflect the change. Keep the Features list, install instructions, and requirements accurate.
preCommit: Check if any files changed since last commit. If so, verify README.md is still accurate — update the Features section, screenshots block, install steps, or requirements as needed.
